allow: PowerShell(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\..", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "conda|mamba|miniforge" } | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Programs" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Sort-Object Name)
